title: Command Center data.json schema
description: Contract between data.json and the Command Center application. All keys documented with type, description, and constraints.

_meta.description: Internal metadata written by the API on every save.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of last write.

description.description: Human-readable description of this data store.

config.description: Workspace configuration. Dashboards read this on every load — change values here, not in the HTML.

org.description: Organisation name shown in the hero eyebrow and AI prompts.

org_subtitle.description: Short subtitle appended to org name in the hero header.

ollama_base.description: Base URL for local Ollama inference server. All dashboards read this before the first AI call.

spaces.description: Ordered list of dashboard spaces shown on the command-center home page.

name.description: Display name shown as the space heading.

href.description: Absolute path to the dashboard page, e.g. '/spoc-hub.html'.

sub_id.description: Optional — HTML element ID for the sub-label, used when the sub text is updated dynamically.

desc.description: One-paragraph description shown on the space row card.

badge_id.description: Optional — HTML element ID of the badge span updated by loadData() on the home page.

badge_static.description: Optional — Static badge text for spaces that do not have a dynamic badge.

done.description: True when the task is complete.

created.description: ISO date the task was created.

team.description: Direct reports. Managed via /api/team. IDs must match schema.json team_ids.

id.description: Short identifier, e.g. 'lk'. Referenced by agent actions.

color.description: CSS hex colour for avatar background.

lastCheck.description: Date of last health check or 1:1.

moods.description: Array of historical mood entries (reserved for future use).

notes.description: 1:1 and observation notes, newest first. Each entry prepended with date by the API.

spoc_log.description: SPOC communication log between Livesystems AG and Post CH AG. Managed via /api/spoc.

title.description: Short title for the log entry.

body.description: Full detail of the communication or decision.

status.description: Current status of this SPOC item.

date.description: ISO date the entry was logged.

projects.description: Active projects managed by the operator. Managed via /api/projects. IDs must match schema.json project_ids.

role.description: Operator's role on this project, e.g. 'Project Manager'.

color.description: CSS hex colour for status indicators.

notes.description: PM notes, newest first. Each entry prepended with date by the API.

weekly_archive.description: Friday lookback and Monday outlook entries. Managed via /api/weekly. Capped at 52 entries.

content.description: Full text of the lookback or outlook.

week.description: ISO week number or date string.

reminders.description: Scheduled reminders. Managed via /api/reminders. Processed by scheduler.py.

send_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime to send the reminder.

sent.description: True after the reminder has been dispatched.

email_history.description: Reserved for future email analytics history storage.

crm_decisions.description: Reserved for future CRM decision log storage.
